query: Copilot PowerPoint MAI Image 2 Efficient model faster image generation presentation feature 2025

It also outpaces leading text- ...
It also outpaces leading text-to-image models by 40% on average2."},{"url":"https://microsoft.ai/news/introducing-mai-image-2-5/","title":"MAI-Image-2.5 launches at No. 2 for image editing on Arena | Microsoft AI","content":"MAI-Image-2.5 produces more detailed, coherent images from prompts, with stronger text rendering, product imagery and prompt adherence.
MAI-Image-2.5 preserves facial identity across edits, maintaining recognizable likeness even through changes in pose, expression or viewpoint.
Across these evaluations, MAI-Image-2.5 demonstrates leading performance in image generation and editing, with strong results across prompt adherence, visual quality, and controlled image modification.
MAI-Image-2.5 Arena scores across all text-to-image categories, compared against MAI-Image-2 and MAI-Image-1 as of June 1st 2026.
MAI-Image-2.5-Flash offers faster, lower-cost generation and editing at $1.75 per 1M text input tokens, $1.75 per 1M image input tokens, and $19.50 per 1M image output tokens."},{"url":"https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/microsoft-365/copilot/release-notes","title":"Release Notes for Microsoft 365 Copilot | Microsoft Learn","content":"3 days ago — MAI‐Image‐2‐Efficient enables users to generate high‐quality visuals directly in PowerPoint, helping them quickly create and refine slides
What changed: Copilot in PowerPoint now includes the MAI‑Image‑2‑Efficient model for image generation.
Reference an existing PowerPoint presentation when creating a new presentation.
Copilot in Viva Glint now generates AI-powered summaries of employee survey results directly within Team Summary and Executive Summary reports, helping leaders quickly understand strengths, opportunities, and trends across their teams.
The model produces higher‑quality visual output with improved text and layout rendering.
Business impact: Enhances presentation quality and visual communication.
Personal impact: Clarifies when and where users can access video generation features.
Microsoft 365 Copilot declarative agents now use the GPT-5.1 model with automatic model selection for performance and reasoning."},{"url":"https://venturebeat.com/technology/microsoft-launches-mai-image-2-efficient-a-cheaper-and-faster-ai-image-model","title":"Microsoft launches MAI-Image-2-Efficient, a cheaper and faster AI image model | VentureBeat","content":"Microsoft today launched MAI-Image-2-Efficient, a lower-cost, higher-speed variant of its flagship text-to-image model that the company says delivers production-ready quality at nearly half the price.
The new model is priced at $5 per million text input tokens and $19.50 per million image output tokens, a roughly 41% reduction from MAI-Image-2's pricing of $5 and $33, respectively, for those same tiers.
Microsoft says the model runs 22% faster than its flagship sibling and achieves 4x greater throughput efficiency per GPU, as measured on NVIDIA H100 hardware at 1024×1024 resolution.
That cadence suggests the MAI Superintelligence team — the research group led by Mustafa Suleyman, CEO of Microsoft AI, that was formed in November 2025 — is operating more like a startup shipping iterative products than a traditional corporate research lab publishing papers."},{"url":"https://siliconangle.com/2026/04/14/microsofts-mai-image-2-efficient-model-accelerates-companys-move-away-openai/","title":"Microsoft's MAI-Image-2-Efficient model accelerates company's move away from OpenAI - SiliconANGLE","content":"The new version is meant to deliver high-quality visuals faster, and at a fraction of the cost of its predecessor, the company said.
Microsoft said MAI-Image-2-Efficient is more cost-effective too, with pricing starting at $5 per million input tokens, the same as the flagship model, and $19.50 per million output tokens, which is 41% cheaper."},{"url":"https://tech.yahoo.com/ai/copilot/articles/microsofts-mai-image-2-efficient-160000392.html","title":"Microsoft's new MAI-Image-2-Efficient model slashes costs ...","content":"Apr 14, 2026 — Microsoft says the model is now 22% faster and 4x more efficient, with 41% of the cost tipped off the scale. Unlock the new features for PowerPoint and Microsoft Copilot plus tips and tricks. Learn how to create beautiful slides, faster than ever. In this step-by-step tutorial, I’ll show how Copilot builds full presentations from scratch, rewrites messy slides, redesigns layouts, summarizes documents, and adds stunning images and speaker notes — all inside Microsoft PowerPoint. Whether you’re a student, teacher, business user, or presenter, Copilot makes PowerPoint faster, smarter, and easier. No more blank-slide stress. Copilot in PowerPoint requires the M365 Copilot subscription: https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/microsoft-365-copilot/pricing?msockid=2ca0c28d8b3869870d71d7e38a0968f1

More useful Copilot videos

The Microsoft Copilot app is being displayed on a smartphone, with the Microsoft logo visible in the background, in this photo illustration taken in Brussels, Belgium, on December 30, 2023. At the beginning of this month, Microsoft unveiled a host of in-house AI models, including MAI-Transcribe-1, MAI-Voice-1 , and MAI-Image-2 with next-gen capabilities acrosstranscription, voice, and image generation. Now, the tech giant is lowering the cost for MAI-Image-2-Efficient while simultaneously making it faster. The company touts the tool as its *"best text-to-image model"* as it generates *"photorealistic and expressive"* images with reliable in-image text. Microsoft says the model is now 22% faster and 4x more efficient, with 41% of the cost tipped off the scale. MAI-Image-2-Efficient will seemingly be faster than its flagship model and 40% faster on average than hyperscaler models. Perhaps more interestingly, Microsoft has two separate text-to-image models: MAI-Image-2-Efficient and MAI-Image-2.","score":0.6102915,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/microsoft-365/copilot/release-notes","title":"Release Notes for Microsoft 365 Copilot","content":"[Skip to main content](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/microsoft-365/copilot/release-notes#main)[Skip to Ask Learn chat experience](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/microsoft-365/copilot/release-notes#). Is copilot image generation down? Microsoft Copilot | Windows Copilot | Feature. * Are you using Copilot from the Windows Copilot app, Microsoft Edge/browser, or the Microsoft 365 Copilot app? * Are you signed in with a personal Microsoft account or a work/school account? * Try using Copilot from a browser instead of the Windows app or test from another device if possible. Copilot image generation is not indicated as down in the provided information. * In Microsoft 365 Copilot and Copilot in PowerPoint, AI image generation uses DALL·E 3 and is exposed through prompts like “Create an image…”. * The image feature in PowerPoint is only available to:. * Image generation in Copilot in PowerPoint is accessed by asking Copilot to “Create an image…”, which then uses DALL·E 3 to generate an image for insertion into a slide. * The signed-in account is a commercial Microsoft 365 Copilot user (where generated images are not yet available), or. * Using Image Generation in Microsoft Copilot.","score":0.4811862,"raw_content":null}],"response_time":0.77,"request_id":"8d75a302-69f7-49bd-b363-8aa9de0c49db"}
